programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Estate agent Ann Maurice offers her expertise to a couple whose home in Rothwell near Leeds is still for sale after 10 months, despite having attracted more than 30 viewings. Her advice includes ridding the house of the all-pervading pet smell, replacing the threadbare stair carpet and adding a lick of paint in a bid to persuade the next viewer to make an offer

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest (1992)
programme.desc: A fairy living in a forest encounters a member of a lumber crew and magically shrinks him down to her size. He learns about the damage humans are doing to the area, and helps defend it when his fellow loggers unwittingly unleash an evil spirit that had been entombed in a tree. Animated adventure, with the voices of Robin Williams, Christian Slater and Tim Curry

programme.title: Over the Hedge (2006)
programme.desc: A raccoon trickster is fretting about his debt to a fearsome bear when he stumbles on some animals waking in the woods after their winter nap. Spotting the chance to solve his problem, the raccoon dupes the gullible creatures into stealing food from a nearby suburb so he can give it to the bear - but they fail to realise they will soon be at the mercy of a vermin exterminator. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bruce Willis, Steve Carell, Garry Shandling and William Shatner

programme.title: The Rewrite (2014)
programme.desc: A washed-up Hollywood screenwriter takes a job at a small university, planning to exploit his position as a local celebrity and do as little work as possible. His cynical outlook begins to change when he falls for a single mother working toward her degree, while a talented pupil makes him consider what he wants from his life. Romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Marisa Tomei, Allison Janney and JK Simmons

programme.title: Exodus: Gods and Kings (2014)
programme.desc: Moses, the adoptive brother of the pharaoh of Egypt, is sent into exile, where he receives a message from God demanding he set all the country's slaves free. When his brother refuses to comply, the kingdom is struck by a series of devastating plagues. Biblical epic, starring Christian Bale, Joel Edgerton, Sigourney Weaver and John Turturro

programme.title: The Greatest Showman (2017)
programme.desc: After losing his job as a bank clerk, PT Barnum creates and develops his circus in New York in the mid-1800s with the help of playwright Phillip Carlyle and an adopted family of entertainers shunned by society. Musical drama, starring Hugh Jackman, Zac Efron, Michelle Williams, Rebecca Ferguson and Zendaya

programme.title: Raging Bull (1980)
programme.desc: Biopic of boxer Jake LaMotta, who rose to fame as the world middleweight champion in the 1940s. His career was marred by an inability to deal with his anger, leaving his family bearing the brunt of his rage and paranoia. Directed by Martin Scorsese and starring an Oscar-winning Robert De Niro alongside Joe Pesci and Cathy Moriarty

programme.title: Serena (2014)
programme.desc: A couple move to North Carolina during the Great Depression to set up a logging empire. While their business proves successful, various revelations create tension between them and ruthless ambition drives both to violent and destructive ends. Period drama based on the novel by Ron Rash, starring Bradley Cooper, Jennifer Lawrence and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest (1960)
programme.desc: Legendary outlaw hero Robin Hood rallies his merry men to thwart a dastardly plan by the Sheriff of Nottingham to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury, who has denounced the sheriff's plot to confiscate another nobleman's land. Medieval adventure, starring Richard Greene, Peter Cushing, Niall MacGinnis, Richard Pasco, Sarah Branch and Oliver Reed

programme.title: Flight of the Navigator (1986)
programme.desc: A boy mysteriously disappears in 1978, and is found eight years later, having not aged a day. He escapes being experimented on by government scientists by taking off in a crashed alien spaceship. With the help of the robot pilot, he tries to find out what has happened to him and if he can get back home. Sci-fi adventure, starring Joey Cramer and Veronica Cartwright, with the voice of Paul Reubens

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
programme.desc: An ordinary man seeks solace from his mundane life by drifting into daydreams where he is a heroic figure. When he and a friend are faced with unemployment, he is propelled into a globetrotting adventure in real life. Comedy drama based on James Thurber's short story, directed by and starring Ben Stiller. With Kristen Wiig, Adam Scott and Shirley MacLaine

programme.title: Leap Year (2010)
programme.desc: A woman plans to take advantage of an Irish tradition to propose to her boyfriend while on holiday in Dublin. When they become separated, she faces a disastrous journey across the country in the company of a charming local innkeeper, and is tempted to leave her boyfriend for her travelling companion. Romantic comedy, starring Amy Adams, Matthew Goode and Adam Scott

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A Cappella group the Barden Bellas enjoy an unprecedented run of success, until a disastrous performance sees them banned from national competitions and beset by scandal. They attempt to turn their fortunes around and redeem their reputation by competing in the World Championships of A Cappella in Copenhagen. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick and Rebel Wilson

programme.title: Animals (2019)
programme.desc: Two close friends find their hedonistic relationship threatened by impending nuptials. Director Sophie Hyde's comedy, adapted by Emma Jane Unsworth from her semi-autobiographical novel, starring Holliday Grainger and Alia Shawkat

programme.title: Nerve (2016)
programme.desc: A teenager finds herself immersed in an online game of truth or dare, where her every move starts to be manipulated by an anonymous community of watchers. Soon, the challenges she and her fellow players are set grow more dangerous, until lives are genuinely at stake. Thriller, starring Emma Roberts and Dave Franco

programme.title: Elle (2016)
programme.desc: After being raped in her home by a masked assailant, Michèle Leblanc does not go to the police as she has far too many other things to concern herself with to put her life on hold. But when Michèle starts getting text messages from the rapist describing her clothing and whereabouts, she arms herself with pepper spray and a small axe, considering all the men in her life a possible suspect. Paul Verhoeven's thriller, starring Isabelle Huppert. In French

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: The Black Arrow (1948)
programme.desc: A knight returning home from fighting in the Wars of the Roses returns home to discover his father has been murdered. A family friend fighting for the other side has been blamed for the crime, but the knight tries to prove his wicked uncle is responsible. Swashbuckling adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel, starring Louis Hayward and Janet Blair

programme.title: Three Amigos! (1986)
programme.desc: Three silent Western movie stars are summoned to Mexico for what they think will be a public appearance - only to discover the locals really believe in their heroic abilities and expect them to rid their town of a group of evil bandits. Comedy, starring Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Logan (2017)
programme.desc: In the near future, Wolverine cares for an ailing Professor X somewhere on the Mexican border. However, the razor-clawed hero's attempts to hide from the world are turned upside down when a young mutant arrives, pursued by cyborg bounty hunters in the employ of a sinister corporation. Fantasy adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Dafne Keen and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Shot Caller (2017)
programme.desc: An ex con is forced by the leaders of his gang to orchestrate a major crime with a brutal rival squad on the streets of Southern California. Crime drama, starring Jon Bernthal, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lake Bell

programme.title: Birth of the Dragon (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring martial artist trains under a young Bruce Lee in 1960s San Francisco, and is drawn into a showdown between his mentor and renowned Shaolin master Wong Jack Man. Martial arts biopic, starring Philip Ng, Billy Magnussen and Yu Xia

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre decides to put Andre Jr to work as an intern at Stevens & Lido during his gap year, while Rainbow allows Ruby to look after Devante when the nanny quits

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When Rainbow makes a new friend at work who is having problems with her ex-husband, Dre realises that his wife has 'broken bird syndrome'. Andre Jr transforms his shared room with Jack into a frat house, so Ruby and Diane gang up against them

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie sells the table football game to a student fraternity as part of her plan to 'baby proof' the apartment, unaware that Ben was using it as a hiding place for Emma's college tuition money. Meanwhile, Riley is not happy that Danny is going out with the sister of her ex-boyfriend. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley decides to travel by train to her family reunion in Florida, so Ben volunteers to tag along, seeing it as the perfect opportunity for them to rekindle their romance. When Tucker gets the chance to co-host a television show, he asks Bonnie for help with his audition tape. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, where her room-mate is also named Erica, but Beverly has a hard time saying goodbye to her daughter. Now that Lainey has gone to college, Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry, even pretending to build one, as in the film Weird Science

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Afraid that she'll be left alone in her old age, Beverly seeks her children's advice on assembling a circle of friends for her later years and attempts to bond with other mothers to form their own group like The Golden Girls. Geoff's romantic gestures begin to annoy Erica, but when she tries to reciprocate, she almost brings their relationship to an end

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is appalled when Geoff arranges for them to go out to dinner with her family to celebrate her birthday. Geoff soon discovers that dinner with the Goldbergs is no ordinary meal out: the family repeatedly change tables, Murray insists Adam order from the children's menu, the food is sent back to the kitchen, and Barry wants to amend his order but Beverly won't allow it. By the end of the evening, Geoff reaches breaking-point

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy work together on a case, but wind up arguing over Jake's old, worn-out mattress. Meanwhile, Boyle scratches Holt's prized car, and the teenage boy Rosa sponsors as a 'big brother' is in trouble with the law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Six weeks after the experiment ended, all the participants reunite for the first time at a final explosive dinner party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Martine and Grace both attend hospital appointments about lumps found in their breasts, before each of them have their interviews for the Businesswoman of the Year Award

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Sandy's patience is tested when Hannah disobeys a direct order, and Joao feels betrayed when he overhears Kasey warning Brooke about his flirtatious ways

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is driven to distraction when a tune becomes stuck in his head, while Amy and Dave arrange another date and Howard and Raj discover their band has a fan, but tracking him down turns out to be a mistake. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Another chance to see the special Stand Up to Cancer edition of the TV review series, originally shown during the night of fundraising in October 2018, with Louis Tomlinson and Liam Payne, Danny and Dani Dyer, Dele Alli and Eric Dier, and Peter Crouch and Abbey Clancy taking to their sofas. What do they think of The Haunting of Hill House, The X Factor, University Challenge, The Yorkshire Vet, Naked Attraction and more?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Capturing the households' instant reactions to programmes including The X Factor, This Time Next Year, Peter York's Hipster Handbook, A Nightmare on Elm Street, First Dates, Poldark and the News. First aired in November 2016

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alice Levine, Asim Chaudhry, Liza Tarbuck, Russell Howard and Tim Vine perform wheelbarrow stunts, build with fruit and emerge from wardrobes, as they compete for the ultimate prize - Taskmaster Greg Davies's disembodied head dipped in gold. As always, Alex Horne is on hand to assist with quiet dignity

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: In a first for the restaurant, mum and daughter Maria and Charlotte arrive for a double date. Maria meets Steve, a divorced 46-year-old builder who has a saucy way with the ladies, while Charlotte is a single mum looking for a man to heal her broken heart. Thirty-year-old academic Dan is matched with cancer cell biologist Jemma from north London, and other diners include long-distance lorry driver Paul who meets Brummie rocker Rozie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The Johnsons follow their tradition of going to the cinema at Christmas but can't agree what to watch: a film about the life of Rosa Parks or the latest superhero blockbuster. Andre Jr is embarrassed about taking a gap year when he bumps into his ex-girlfriend Megan

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre has to take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school so he hatches a plan for them to escape to a luxury hotel for some pampering. Rainbow gets an award at work

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley decides she would prefer to keep it a secret when she and Ben start dating again. Meanwhile, the family members return to their old neighbourhood to take part in a local party, and Danny considers moving to Paris when Georgie gets a new job there. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben, Danny and Tucker are looking forward to attending the biggest Halloween celebration in the city, despite the fact that Bonnie thinks they should take Emma trick-or-treating instead. When their plans fall through, they decide to gatecrash a party that Riley is attending, not realising that it's actually a hen party and they will soon live to regret their rash decision

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isn't long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly intervenes when she finds out that Coach Mellor has a strained relationship with his brother, Coach Nick, but when the two men face off in the gym, Adam and Barry join in. Meanwhile, Geoff and Erica struggle with their long-distance relationship

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides to reinvent herself by going to night school so that she can quit her substitute teacher role and own her own business, but Murray dislikes change and tries to convince her to take a different path. Meanwhile, Barry embarks on a makeover of his own, and Erica struggles to balance her academic studies with her social life in college and calls on Adam for assistance

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is excited to work a case with the best detective in the NYPD, Dave Majors - until his colleague shares his intentions to ask Amy out on a date. Rosa's surprising fashion choice causes a stir, and Charles and Gina make an unexpected discovery. Comedy, with Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt begins to worry he is being set up for a fall by one of his superiors, and Peralta is handed the chance to work on an important case. Meanwhile, Jeffords tries to make sure his twins get a place at their chosen school. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Terry Crews

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Murray fall out over Adam's plans to pursue a comedy career after his attempts to be funny in woodwork class nearly result in his teacher getting injured. Beverly and Geoff worry that college is turning Erica into a pretentious snob, but they allow Barry to coach them in the finer points of culture in an attempt to stay close to her

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry looks to secure a spot on the high school football team but is quickly consigned to the bench by Coach Mellor for his lack of sporting prowess. Adam decides to help his brother understand that there are other ways he can contribute to the squad's success

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is left looking after Terry's pregnant wife, only for panic to set in when her waters break sooner than expected. A computer outage forces Amy and Charles to process all the paperwork by hand. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In an attempt to solve an international jewel theft case, Peralta and Diaz are forced to work with a pair of Swedish detectives and things get very competitive, very quickly. Santiago and Jeffords offer to help Gina prepare for an examination, and Captain Holt enlists Boyle as his squash partner for an important tournament. Anders Holm and Riki Lindhome guest star

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Six weeks after the experiment ended, the participants watch footage from the show for the first time, before Dean and Tracey reveal one final shocking twist

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A furious Celeste gives Peri a piece of her mind. Elsewhere, Ste takes drastic action to get his hands on some cash, and Summer goes out of her way to help Sienna

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hannah and Conrad re-evaluate whether their opposite outlooks on life will be able to co-exist off the boat. Brooke and Kasey start to air their grievances over Hannah's work ethic

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After more than five years of dating, Sheldon and Amy spend their first night together, while Leonard, Howard and Raj must decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket. Plus, Sheldon's Obi-Wan advises him on his difficult relationship decisions. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with recurring guest star Bob Newhart

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps Megan and Jonathan Robertson, who became parents in their teens, and four kids later they have never really grown up

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Croydon mates Josh and Jack take part in a double date, but problems arise after they meet Morgan and Jasmine, and both fall for the same girl. Meanwhile, divorced mum-of-two Sandy hopes to find romance with an astrology expert Steve, though incompatible star signs may be a problem. And tomboy boat-builder Abbey returns to the restaurant, but will she find a soul mate in Eddie, an odd job man who's nervous around women?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from November 2016, in which the householders direct their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional attentions to The Grand Tour, The X Factor, Planet Earth II, Breaking the Silence Live, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Who Do You Think You Are? and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.desc: GI Joe is put up to his biggest challenge yet, while Orville Redenbacher stars in the next Hollywood blockbuster - Children of the Popcorn

When Andre Jr claims there is unspoken colourism within the Johnson family, things get heated

programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, while, Jack and Diane try to get information about her from social media

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Ben grows grumpier about all the fuss surrounding the yuletide season, so he makes a wish that the holiday had never existed. However, when his wish is granted, he's completely unprepared for the consequences: Emma's existence is erased and everyone's lives are set on totally different courses

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben starts to suspect that Riley might secretly be in love with Danny and comes up with a plan to find out the truth, while Bonnie takes extreme measures when she experiences financial problems. Jean-Luc Bilodeau stars in this comedy following the exploits of a man raising his infant daughter with help from his friends and family

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear, so Murray teaches Adam to agree mindlessly with everything his girlfriend says just to keep her happy. However, Murray's strategy soon backfires, causing issues in his relationship with Beverly. Meanwhile, as Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry aims to get back together with her

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray's furniture shop faces competition from a rival with an attention-grabbing advertising campaign, so Adam offers to make his father a television commercial starring Marvin. When Barry's attempts to court a girl at school end in failure, Beverly steps in with some advice that works a little too well

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After Captain Holt is transferred to the NYPD Department of Public Relations, the arrival of a new captain causes the precinct to dissolve into chaos - despite the best efforts of Sergeant Jeffords. meanwhile, Peralta and Santiago face the aftermath of their kiss. Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howard's hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesn't stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadette's disapproval

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An argument between Leonard and Sheldon over the ending of a Harry Potter book affects Amy and Penny's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Howard goes on a trip to Las Vegas with Bernadette and asks Raj to keep an eye on his mother while he is away

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Barry bets Murray he knows where to find the best cheesesteak sandwich ever, so they drive to New Jersey to settle the issue

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly catches a glimpse of her soon-to-be empty nest, she replaces her children with the Mellor brothers, nursing Coach Mellor back to health after he falls off the rope climbing equipment. Meanwhile, Erica and her college room-mate get on each other's nerves

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta, Boyle and Gina get involved in a Die Hard-type hostage situation while doing some off-duty shopping on Christmas Eve, so Jeffords is forced to leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in Ukraine for his fiancee Anna, hoping to impress his bride-to-be and her mother. Will Andy's big wedding abroad be a hit with Anna, or will it all get lost in translation?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Fergus discovers that Ste is strapped for cash and makes him an offer. Meanwhile, Martine confronts Felix about whether he wants to be with her

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao's contempt for one another grows even stronger when Joao ruffles Hannah's feathers. And, on the first day of charter, strong winds leave the boat stuck at the dock

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets more than she bargained for when Leonard agrees to meet a psychiatrist on her behalf, while Sheldon and Raj collaborate on an astronomical discovery. Stuart moves out, but Howard and Bernadette's happiness is short-lived. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Edinburgh musician Jamie says he is fed up of attracting groupies and wants more than a brief fling. Twenty-year-old musical theatre student Jasmin from Bognor Regis has been diagnosed with the chronic fatigue illness ME and wants to meet someone who will accept her for who she is. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Strictly Come Dancing, The Secret Life of the Zoo, The X Factor, Rillington Place, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, First Dates, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here! and 24 Hours in A&E. First aired in December 2016

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The comedians are challenged to taste-test some mystery baby food, Russell Howard presents a nightmarish fairy tale and Liza Tarbuck introduces a plastic lizard to a cordless drill

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The latest diners looking for love are retired labourer Ted, who's 69. He lost his wife Carol in 2013 after 40 years of marriage. He meets 67-year-old retired legal secretary Marian, who's been married four times but hasn't given up on love. Also dining are Fran, 47, who meets 46-year-old builder and part-time erotic thriller writer Colin. Plus, part-time model Linford, 25, meets 29-year-old advertising sales manager Xanthi from London, and coffee shop manager Oliver hopes for romance with personal assistant Loren

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre and Rainbow are furious when they see that Diane has been given poor lighting in her class photo and decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity towards all complexions. When Andre Jr claims there is unspoken colourism within the Johnson family, things get heated

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, while, Jack and Diane try to get information about her from social media

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Ben grows grumpier about all the fuss surrounding the yuletide season, so he makes a wish that the holiday had never existed. However, when his wish is granted, he's completely unprepared for the consequences: Emma's existence is erased and everyone's lives are set on totally different courses

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits Manhattan, where she creates candy canes and lollipops at artisan sugar crafter Papabubble, before heading back to the UK to learn how to make passion fruit marshmallows covered in chocolate and coconut

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Francophiles Madeline and Andy Morton from Portsmouth are looking for a holiday home they can fly or drive to in the rural landscapes of the Charente region in west-central France. With cash savings of £45,000, they're hoping for a traditional two-bedroom home with charm and character. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties, hoping that one will be their dream house

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in people's homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers struggle with an estate that involves a series of wills dating back to the 19th century, and when a vicar dies in Surrey, the team returns to Middlesbrough to delve into its steelmaking history. Plus, details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: A Cambridgeshire couple plan to build a four-bedroom detached house for the cost of a tiny terrace - which requires working around the clock and calling in a lot of favours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Alston House in Cumbria, where owners Michael and Carole Allchorne are brimming with confidence, but Yvonne Copeland and Gail Wells are less than impressed with the decor. The guests are impressed with chef Michael's breakfast, but the hosts are left reeling by the criticisms levelled at their hotel during the feedback session

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Scotia House in Harrogate, where host Marie Lock is hoping her obsessive cleaning regime will give her the edge in the competition. In the rooms, both Michael and Carole and Yvonne and Gail find the deluxe teddy bears freaky, and for Billy and Billy, things are a little on the cosy side. In the afternoon, Marie's keen to show off her moves and pits her guests against each other in a Northern Soul dance off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Canberra Guest House in Blackpool for the third day of the competition, where host Yvonne Copeland, joined by her part-time helper Gail Wells, hopes her cheap and cheerful B&B will win over her guests. However, Marie finds what she thinks is urine and hair on the toilet seat in her room, and a lack of wi-fi means Billy Junior has to put his business on hold. Yvonne takes her competitors to a local reptile house, but serious divisions unfold within the group, and later, tensions rise again at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Crown and Kitchen in East Linton, East Lothian, owned by father and son Billy and Billy Jr Robertson, who see themselves as the jokers of the pack. Yvonne and Gail leave no mattress unturned in their room inspection, although Michael and Carole are impressed. Later, Yvonne makes quite a splash when the hosts organise an assault course for their guests, but slow service during breakfast leaves the B&Bers disappointed - especially when Billy Jr is at a loss to explain what the problem was

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Things are tense from the start as Carole and Michael from Alston House challenge Marie on her comments. Next, Marie from Scotia House wants to set the record straight with allegations of tit-for-tat scoring. The group members proceed to thrash out their differences before the week's winners are revealed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit landed gent Sir Benjamin Slade as they search for more upcycling prospects. Simon converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry refurbishes a club fender fire surround and turns a quick profit on a Fordson tractor

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger Kirana faces losing her two cubs, who are fully grown and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. Indonesian dwarf buffalo Oana, one of Chester's most sensitive animals, gives birth - only for the new mum's anxiety to threaten the calf's health

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Donna McDougal's search for the armour in the lake continues. Tim and Krys, with the help of Tim's brother Ben, continue in their struggle to get the attic converted in time for the first guests of the season. Dick and his mother-in-law Jenny struggle with preparing and freezing 227kg of pork, before attempting to turn the final 2kg into salamis

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Tiffany and Jonny Wood build a modernist home in Bath, opting for an environmentally friendly prefabricated German kit house, but first they have to prepare the site - an extremely steep hill. When the couple are close to starting construction, disaster strikes as a storm hits

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt reveals his plan for increasing biodiversity in the woodland and planting the apple tree orchard that his parents Mike and Janice have always dreamed of. Farrier John pays the donkeys a visit and is surprised to find them living next to an unexpected new neighbour, and Matt visits the garage to see whether they've had any luck getting dad his dad's old Dodge up and running

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell taking on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Jon Snow's Very Hard Questions
programme.desc: Singers on Buzzers and Shrewd Operators go head to head as they face tough questions on topics including science, sport and history. Hosted by Jon Snow

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 43-year-old cyclist is brought to A&E after crashing face first into a car, with injuries are so severe that he was put into an induced coma at the scene. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Pat awaits the results of an X-ray after injuring her leg on holiday, and 89-year-old Adrian complains of chest pain

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell taking on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt reveals his plan for increasing biodiversity in the woodland and planting the apple tree orchard that his parents Mike and Janice have always dreamed of. Farrier John pays the donkeys a visit and is surprised to find them living next to an unexpected new neighbour, and Matt visits the garage to see whether they've had any luck getting dad his dad's old Dodge up and running

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits one of Kenya's largest tea plantations and discovers that tea comes in multiple grades and flavours, and every batch can be subtly different. Matt Tebbutt dives in Cornwall for the edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves and Kate Quilton heads to Slovenia and Northern Ireland, eager to learn about the increasing use of rosemary in foodstuffs

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin searches Lot-et-Garonne in south-west of France for Karen Wright and Philip Johnston, who dream of retiring to the country. They have £100,000, but that isn't just for them. The property needs to be large enough for their five dogs - and to accommodate even more as they have a dream of fostering rescue pooches

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien come across a water trough and a cartwheel as they continue their mission to turn unwanted items into hard cash

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers are surprised to discover two unclaimed estates in the same family. The team also explains how an heir hunt led to a story of Antarctic exploration. Plus, details of more cases are revealed

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a Suffolk family with a love of horses that plans to build an oak-framed cottage. However, their approach to managing a modest budget is more hit-and-hope than spreadsheet savvy. With couple Steve and Susan facing ruin, Charlie is forced into one of his famous pep talks to bring the project back in line and spring the family-of-four from their caravan exile

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Newton House in Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, where Denise Carter and Jackie Fennell's traditional B&B focuses on organic, free-range breakfasts. Over dinner, guest Marianne Cammack and Deina Thomas from dominate the conversation, riling up some of the others, while Mike Hayes and Neal Widdowson think the morning meal is all way too fancy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to the Highlands Pub in Blackpool, where managers Mike Hayes and Neal Widdowson are all about value for money. However, Sean and Kathryn are horrified by what they find in their room, while Marianne and Deina think that theirs needs the female touch. In the afternoon the group competes in a basketball challenge at the amusement arcades, where the quiet hosts come out of their shells

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the White House in Brighton for the third day of the competition, where hosts Sean Edlin and Kathryn Turnbull run a laid-back seaside B&B. Denise and Jackie think the rooms are not well equipped and Marianne finds them clinical, while Mike and Neal are unsure about the price. Tensions are temporarily alleviated by a visit to the famous Theatre Royal, but Marianne and Deina continue to cause trouble at dinner. In the morning, a locally sourced breakfast impresses some of the guests, but the group must decide whether they are getting value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wakes Hall Lodges near Colchester is the fourth and final visit of the week, where Neal and Mike are wowed by the five-star self-catering accommodation, complete with hot tubs and lakeside views. The others aren't so sure about the 'luxury' breakfast hamper, however, especially as it means cooking their own. An afternoon of dog agility gives manager Marianne Cammack the chance to demonstrate her authority, although over dinner, her domineering conversation causes Jackie to finally snap

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Mike and Neal from the Highlands Pub challenge the comments that they were considered dirty and lacking in facilities, while Sean and Kathryn from the White House are left smarting after suffering large underpayments for what they think are minor issues. Eventually, the winner is finally revealed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Four Sumatran orang-utans escape from their quarters, and tempting them back inside proves easier said than done, while the dominant female meerkat faces trouble from her daughter, who is launching physical attacks upon her mother. A young Asian elephant keeps the rest of the herd entertained as they adapt to the loss of two members to a virus. The keepers believe it needs a playmate its own age, but their hopes rest on the bull elephant mating with the females once more

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: In the Pays de la Loire, twenty-something couple Billy and Gwendoline want to open their chateau as a wedding location, but it's not going to plan as the chimney seems to have caught fire. Near Dijon, Clive and Tanith run an upmarket chateau hotel but need to win over the locals, so they put on an open day. Meanwhile, sisters Tanya and Marian prepare to visit their chateau in the Loire Valley. They need to get it ready for the first guests of the summer in less than a week's time, but are faced with everything from dead flies to leaking swimming pools

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Checking on the progress of David and Greta Iredale, who replaced the timber house they designed themselves more than 40 years ago with a Huf Haus that was constructed by an efficient German construction team in just six days. Kevin McCloud finds out how successful the pair were in personalising the property

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Liz and Caleb find themselves working on a case together, defending a soldier court-martialled for sabotaging the weapon of his superior officer. Lucca accompanies her new friend and client Bianca on a memorable trip to the Caribbean. Legal drama, starring Christine Baranski, Cush Jumbo, Audra McDonald, Hugh Dancy and Chasten Harmon

programme.title: The Tudors
programme.desc: Cardinal Wolsey bears the brunt of the king's anger when the ecclesiastical court announces it will have to consult with Rome before granting a divorce. Anne takes advantage of the delay by introducing the monarch to Martin Luther's teachings, while Sir Thomas More meets Francis I to make sure he is not planning to reconcile with Spain. Drama, starring Jonathan Rhys Meyers and Sam Neill

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Beth, 68, is rushed to St George's after falling down a flight of stairs and badly breaking her ankle, meaning she faces emergency surgery and intensive physiotherapy to walk again. Leigh, 67, is admitted with head injuries after being knocked off his bicycle in a hit-and-run incident and medics are concerned he has suffered a severe trauma to his head as he was not wearing a helmet, while 26-year-old Luke arrives in A&E after an accident at work involving an electric saw

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Johnny Vegas and Rhod Gilbert taking on Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: When tasked with turning the opioid epidemic around, Max shuts down the ED and proposes a massive change. Sharpe goes to great lengths to prove a point. Medical drama, starring Ryan Eggold

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Liz and Caleb find themselves working on a case together, defending a soldier court-martialled for sabotaging the weapon of his superior officer. Lucca accompanies her new friend and client Bianca on a memorable trip to the Caribbean. Legal drama, starring Christine Baranski, Cush Jumbo, Audra McDonald, Hugh Dancy and Chasten Harmon

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Australia to investigate eucalyptus, which is found in throat lozenges and chewing gum, with a local farmer shows her the clever way the highly toxic plant is made safe for human consumption. Jimmy Doherty is in Poland to find out about sauerkraut, before learning about a remarkable new use for its juice in a French power station, while Matt Tebbutt examines whether coffee, tomatoes, potatoes or even red wine should be kept in the fridge

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie teams up with cider-maker Andy Thomstone to make a winter version of a popular drink, and demonstrates how to create the Italian favourite limoncello using leftover lemons

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Jasmine Harman helps Steph Fessey and Andy Wynn from Hampshire search for a property on Portugal's Silver Coast within a budget of £100,000. The couple are looking for a house with a spacious garden for when their children and grandchildren visit, as well as views of the countryside

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien discover items including baby scales, an oil can and a glass cabinet that are ready for upcycling to turn a profit for their owners

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien hope a clay pigeon trap, a searchlight and a Peugeot 205 will help make a profit for their owners

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A member of the team celebrates retirement, while research into the estate of a Scottish woman reveals two generations of coachmen who worked during the dawn of the motoring age. Plus, details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Shrewsbury to meet Dave and Elly, who are aiming to stamp their mark on a suburban street with a modern take on a Victorian terrace. Although their plans read well, they don't factor in a string of delays caused by stringent planning constraints. Throw a rapidly growing family into the mix, and the race is on to finish Dave and Elly's home before the cash runs out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition begins at No 33 Hunstanton in Norfolk, where owner Janie Thompson and housekeeper Gemma Layfield hope their quirky design and high-end brand of luxury will win the day. Despite the decor, the in-room bath receives a soggy reception from Cheryle and Anthony Katz, owners of The Lansdowne in the Cotswolds. An afternoon of painting sees Mark and Jan Rummery from The Ivybridge in Goodwick, Wales, emerge as the ones to beat and the group's banter begins. At dinner, father-and-son duo Mick and Chris Emanuele from La Tavola Calda in Nuneaton reveal that they're B&B old-timers and their Italian roots pique interest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to La Tavola Calda in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, where father and son team Mick and Chris Emanuele run a basic B&B above their Italian restaurant

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Lansdowne in the Cotswolds for the third day of the contest, where Janie and Gemma like the rooms, but Mick and Chris are determined to find fault

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to the Ivybridge Hotel and Spa in Fishguard Bay, Pembrokeshire, where Mark and Jan Rummery have brought their hospitality experience in Asia to Wales. On arrival, Cheryle and Anthony are unimpressed to be housed in an annexe, and Mick and Chris dismiss the bathroom as a bodge job. During an afternoon of Chinese cookery, the tensions are palpable as relationships continue to disintegrate

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to thrash out their issues. No 33 Hunstanton is up first, as hosts Janie and Gemma quiz Mark and Jan over their privacy problems. Next, father and son duo Mick and Chris Emanuele from La Tavola Calda want to put Cheryle and Anthony's sleep issues to bed. Eventually, matters are resolved and the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Henry Cole visit a motorbike fan, making table lamps from engines and turning a pallet and iron wheels into a stylish modern coffee table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Pedro the giant anteater is about to be reunited with long-term mate Bliss, but falls ill and faces a major operation, with an uncertain outcome. Chester Zoo's extremely rare bald ibises produce a batch of new chicks, which are destined to be released back into the wild in southern Spain. There is also a chance to witness the reunion of rhino couple Beni and Asha, who have been kept separate for four years

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael locate their heating problem, but it means that Billy - who's scared of height - has to repoint the chimney 20 metres up. Clive and Tanith get their hands dirty trying to work out what's stopped the fountain working at their hotel and Michelin-starred restaurant. Meanwhile, the clock's ticking for sisters Marian and Tanya as they try to sort out a winter's worth of problems

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Helen Gould and Phil Reddy five years after they built an earth-sheltered home in Cumbria. The presenter finds out if the house has survived without water leaking in and whether it has delivered the eco-friendly life the couple desired

programme.title: Deutschland 89
programme.desc: Everyone converges in Leipzig as Martin tries to prevent Lenora's assassination plot, while Valdez and Brigitte work with Rose to stop Lenora. At the Trade Fair, Schweppenstette closes a deal and Fritz pitches to potential investors. Elsewhere, Tina discovers the horrifying truth about her visitor. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old motorcyclist Michelle is rushed to A&E after crashing head first into a lamp-post, with scans revealing that she has broken bones in her neck, arm and shoulder and requires emergency surgery. Timothy, 69, arrives at St George's after riding his bicycle into the back of a parked ambulance, while 33-year-old expectant mother Eleanor is admitted after cutting her thumb on a meat cleaver

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Liam, 31, is rushed to St George's after collapsing at home after his fourth epileptic seizure of the day, and he experiences another at the hospital, while 89-year-old Mair is brought to A&E with severe chest pain and difficulty breathing and doctors take blood samples to test whether her symptoms are due to pneumonia. Twelve-year-old Lauren arrives by ambulance after breaking her leg while scoring a try in a rugby match and she needs extensive surgery to give her the best chance of walking normally again

Twelve-year-old Lauren arrives by ambulance after breaking her leg while scoring a try in a rugby match and she needs extensive surgery to give her the best chance of walking normally again

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton learns some important differences between gelato and ice-cream at a parlour in Rome, while Jimmy Doherty visits Mauritius to find out about white and dark rum and learns where the term 'proof' originally came from in relation to alcohol. Matt Tebbutt visits a traditional sweet factory in Blackburn to examine why his mouth goes cold when he sucks on a mint

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Late Nite Eats
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino is on the hunt to find restaurants that reign supreme in the late-night food scene, meeting other chefs to taste their most popular dishes

programme.title: Late Nite Eats
programme.desc: in Oakland, Jordan Andino is blown away by Chef Chris' interpretation of traditional Korean Bibimbap - served with softshell crab, kimchee and grilled pineapple

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz stage a picking intervention in Massachusetts, and later help a collector whose massive stockpile is facing eviction

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: T-Money bids on some mystery casks, before discovering a German gun

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: T-Money heads to an auction in a Californian suburb and lands himself some fishing equipment

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The pickers find a reclusive collector hiding deep in the north woods of Maine and make a visit to the one-man village of Timtown

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank makes a shrewd bid that leads to a big discovery and Mike falls hard for two century-old cars

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: More thrills, spills, customer carts and crashes in this extreme downhill battle at the Eduardo VII Park in Lisbon

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May each buy a rear-wheel-drive coupe for £1,500 and find themselves entered into a French ice race. Richard discovers a way to fill the waiting time for flights by inventing the sport of airport-vehicle racing, Jeremy gets behind the wheel of the BMW Z4, and actress Sienna Miller is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are each challenged to find a classic car at auction for £3,000. Exploring whether they are more fun to drive than modern alternatives, the trio then take the vehicles to Majorca to compete in a rally. Jeremy also test-drives the BMW Z4 and Nissan 370Z, and AC/DC frontman Brian Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on another round of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, beginning with Portuguese capital Lisbon. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes with hints of cinnamon and freshly chopped coriander from the east and tomatoes and chillies from the Americas. Rick is inspired to cook salt cod fritters and an almond tart, before heading for the St Anthony's Day Parade and Sardine Festival

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May are challenged to create a TV advert for Volkswagen, but soon fall out as James concentrates on detailed information on fuel economy and Jeremy wants something more exciting.
