programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Schönbrunn Palace in Austria, which is located in a 500-acre park and includes an orangery, palm house and one of Europe's oldest zoos

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: The Royal Palace of Caserta near Naples, Italy, which was created by Luigi Vanvitelli and houses a silk factory that dates back to the 18th century and still functions to this day

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The unsolved murders committed by the Butcher of Kingsbury Run, a serial killer operating in Cleveland, Ohio, in the 1930s. The Butcher killed at least 12 men and women, dismembering their bodies and scattering them across the city

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Artefacts for sale at auction are examined to reveal their historical significance, including items linked to German warships, vampire mythology, and Queen Victoria's coronation

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Auction lots are examined to reveal their historical significance, including a large collection of antique taxidermy and a love token from a convict transported overseas

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his trusty copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide of 1913, Michael Portillo explores the former domain of the Habsburg monarchs, beginning in the Hungarian capital Budapest. He then travels to Austria via Bratislava in Slovakia, and in Vienna he immerses himself in pre-First World War decadence. From there he heads to Salzburg, before going on to the Salzkammergut region to visit the emperor's Austrian summer residence at Bad Ischl, where in 1914 Franz Joseph I signed a declaration that changed the course of European history

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle in Oxfordshire, where items brought in for valuation include two 18th-century paintings depicting the house's servants and a Chinese-made silver mug. Plus, the story of a pilot who is believed to have flown Britain's first scheduled air service before becoming one of the first recruits to the Royal Flying Corps

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris crosses Australia from south to north following the original ill-fated route of the 2,000 mile-long Adelaide to Darwin railway. After beginning his journey on a luxury modern train, he transfers to one of the line's surviving steam locomotives before hitting the Outback, where he quickly concludes that a 4x4 is a more practical means of travelling. He passes through ghost towns and explores abandoned railway relics before uncovering why most of the southern section of the line eventually had to be abandoned. At Alice Springs he hitches a ride on a freight train headed for Darwin and reaches his final destination after nearly 24 hours in the cramped cab

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a vicious dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the open American wilderness

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world

programme.title: Secrets of the Third Reich: The Search for Hitler's Bomb
programme.desc: Part two of two. A look at Nazi experiments into atomic weapons, examining how close they got to developing a functioning nuclear device before the end of the war

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The story of the siege of Kohima in 1944, when heavily outnumbered British and Indian troops held off Japanese forces until reinforcements could arrive

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle in Oxfordshire, where items brought in for valuation include two 18th-century paintings depicting the house's servants and a Chinese-made silver mug. Plus, the story of a pilot who is believed to have flown Britain's first scheduled air service before becoming one of the first recruits to the Royal Flying Corps

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Germany, beginning his journey in Berlin - which at the beginning of the 20th Century was a powerhouse of science and technology. Led by his copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide of 1913, he heads west via the Harz Mountains to the industrial Ruhr Valley to learn how imperial Germany was ready for war. He then goes south along the tourist trail of the castle-studded Rhine river and ends in the Rheingau to taste the wines of its vineyards

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: A look at Sweden's passion for subterranean spaces and how this nation has taken extraordinary precautions to protect itself - by excavating an astounding 65,000 nuclear bunkers. In south-west England, deep in the Mendip Hills of Somerset, lies one of the most spectacular landscapes in the UK, but beneath this breath-taking landscape sits secret caverns and magical rock formations carved out by nature. Plus, how in Romania, nside a 1.2km-thick layer of salt, sits a world underground first

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A power cut on a sweltering summer night gives Victor and Margaret time to reflect on their lives together and look forward, without enthusiasm, to a visit from their elderly neighbours. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Roy Hudd star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is invited to talk about evolution at the Women's Institute, and finds plenty of inspiration when he decides to take up fishing. Meanwhile, Pippa is left shattered after a three-week visit by Patrick's equally stuffy brother. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: After years of frustrated anger and railing against the system, Victor Meldrew breathes his last 'I don't believe it' after falling victim to a hit-and-run driver. At first, it seems as if the shock of his death will take a long time to settle for long-suffering Margaret

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Helga tells Von Strohm that the stolen money was forged, so he thinks up a plan to get rid of the cash, while Michelle and Crabtree hatch a plot to get the airmen back to England

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Herr Flick arrests Leclerc and issues a proclamation he'll be shot if the stolen Gestapo money is not returned, while Edith is in a romantic mood and Fanny decides to bake a potato

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene narrowly escapes 258 exploding Christmas puddings and quickly becomes embroiled in another daring plot proposed by Michelle and the Resistance

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Racegoers head to two major meetings at Newbury Racecourse, with the company sending staff to a usually unmanned station to help keep things running smoothly. Paddington controller Dave Turner ensures that the correct train arrives at the intended platform at the right time, and the emergency services are called into action at the Penzance depot

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: The small, picturesque seaside station at Dawlish in Devon is brought to life by an influx of people attending an air show, and the company lays on extra staff, schedules more trains and employs different queuing systems to cope with all the passengers. At Bath Spa, gate-line operator Peter Eagle tries his hand at foreign languages as he directs international tourists to and from the ancient city

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Kensington Palace in London, which began life as an early 17th-century Jacobean mansion before becoming a palace fit for the monarchy, and was the brainchild of Christopher Wren

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of Neuschwanstein Castle in the Alps of southern Germany. Created for eccentric king Ludwig the second in the 19th century, the castle is both a visual and engineering marvel that was an influence on Walt Disney. Containing a huge throne room and man-made cave, it took 17 years to build but was never fully completed after Ludwig was deposed, incarcerated and mysteriously died in 1868

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1879, widow Julia Martha Thomas was killed in her own home by her servant. The death of struck at the heart of Victorian society, at the sanctity of the home and the rigid divides between the classes, for Kate Webster did not only kill and dismember her employer - she stole her clothes, her property and her identity

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Featuring items belonging to the crew of the Titanic and the Great Train Robbery suspects, plus dresses worn by Bjork and a key belonging to Catherine the Great

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: Featuring cycling jerseys worn by Britain's first Tour de France winner, a rare watch, and a silver cigarette case linked to the Russian Revolution

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Germany, beginning his journey in Berlin - which at the beginning of the 20th Century was a powerhouse of science and technology. Led by his copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide of 1913, he heads west via the Harz Mountains to the industrial Ruhr Valley to learn how imperial Germany was ready for war. He then goes south along the tourist trail of the castle-studded Rhine river and ends in the Rheingau to taste the wines of its vineyards

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Baddesley Clinton, a moated manor house near Birmingham. Items brought in to be valued include a diamond bracelet once worn by Rita Hayworth, a wooden peg that was removed from a child's eye in the 1870s, a painting by Lord Mountbatten of his family home and a controversial carving of St George that offended a church's parishioners. One visitor brings in a rare wooden pedestal, and is chastised by one of the Roadshow experts for stripping it of the original paintwork

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris takes a trip through India on the Konkan railway, a line that opened in 1998 and runs down the west coast. He starts his journey at dawn in the country's financial capital Mumbai, where the Mandovi Express is the first of many trains he catches along the 472 miles of track running through the states of Maharashtra, Goa and Karnataka. To keep the line straight, 92 tunnels and 2,000 bridges had to be built in one of the wettest areas of the subcontinent and Chris joins the monsoon team, which patrols daily to ensure that it is free from obstructions

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A secretive underground base that concealed the power to destroy nations, and a sprawling industrial relic clinging to the edge of an unforgiving waterfall

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A marooned ironclad structure off the coast of England that hides a dramatic story of war and resilience, and a facility in the heart of America that helped tear apart a nation

programme.title: Secrets of the Third Reich: The Nazi Gold Train
programme.desc: Part one of two. The search for a missing train containing Nazi treasure, which was believed to have been hidden in the mountains of Poland

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The story of Major General Roy Urquhart, who successfully evaded the enemy in his retreat across the Rhine after leading British troops into a doomed attack at Arnhem

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Baddesley Clinton, a moated manor house near Birmingham. Items brought in to be valued include a diamond bracelet once worn by Rita Hayworth, a wooden peg that was removed from a child's eye in the 1870s, a painting by Lord Mountbatten of his family home and a controversial carving of St George that offended a church's parishioners. One visitor brings in a rare wooden pedestal, and is chastised by one of the Roadshow experts for stripping it of the original paintwork

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of early 20th-century travellers, Michael Portillo uses his 1913 copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide to explore Switzerland, which was a favourite with Edwardian tourists. He begins in Basel, travels east to visit the industrial regions of Zurich and learns about the engineering feats needed to thread the rail network through the Alps. He takes in the striking beauty of Lake Lucerne, before ending with an ascent by train to Europe's highest station at Jungfraujoch

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How Japan's early victories over Allied forces during the Second World War convinced its people that their strength and discipline would bring them victory. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Allied offensive in the Pacific, where America's two-pronged attack led to heavy casualties on both sides, as the Japanese mounted a ferocious defence. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The Good Nazi

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Bruce Parkin steps off a train with his family to attend his retirement party after 52 years' service, making him one of Europe's longest-serving drivers. programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: A major service disruption hits Paddington on Meet the Manager day, and there is a look at Brunel's last engineering masterpiece, the Royal Albert Bridge, which spans the River Tamar and connects Devon and Cornwall. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Jilly from Brighton want to seize the day and buy a holiday home they can escape to at a moment's notice in the picturesque Dordogne region of south west France. With a budget of £100,000, Laura Hamilton leaves no stone unturned, showing five incredible properties, but which one will have them reaching for their chequebook?

programme.title: The Royal House of Windsor
programme.desc: This episode reveals how Prince Philip was frustrated by having to give up his beloved naval career in exchange for a lifetime of trailing after his wife - but channelled his energy into becoming the Windsors' most radical moderniser. When Elizabeth is catapulted on to the throne, her husband wants to assert his rights by having his children bear his surname of Mountbatten. But the young and inexperienced Queen faces formidable opposition from her mother, grandmother and the most powerful man in the land, the PM Sir Winston Churchill. They want the Royal Family to retain the very English name 'Windsor', and the Queen gives in. Philip deals with this blow by launching a series of radical modernisation projects: overhauling the management of Buckingham Palace and refitting the Royal Yacht. But he's thwarted at every turn by the palace old guard who distrust him and dislike change. In 1956, the Prince responds by setting off alone on a four-month world cruise, giving rise to rumours of a

programme.title: The Real Prince Philip: A Royal Officer
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the Duke of Edinburgh's life and career, emphasising the role his military experiences played in his later achievements, and how that his ethos of 'service' and 'duty' was forged during his impressive naval career

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old salesman James is paired with 31-year-old Serena, who is looking for a reformed bad boy after a history of dating disasters. Fifty-year-old cancer survivor Sara is impressed with her match, fellow fitness fanatic Peter, and 39-year-old singleton Rose opens up about her Crohn's disease to her date Jordan - something she always does on a first date to see if men are put off

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson returns with the daring dating show in which two singletons choose a date from six naked people, whose naked bodies are slowly revealed to them from the feet up. First up is 32-year-old wrester Iain from Manchester, who loses his nerve when he's not in the ring. Can the show find hi the perfect partner to pin him down for good? He is followed by 32-year-old graphic designer Leon from south London. Having recently lost weight, this bi-curious graphic designer is looking for the perfect partner - female or his first male - to share his new body

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Actor John Lithgow, comedian Jon Richardson, Paralympian Hannah Cockroft, and funnyman Russell Brand take on three challenges in the baking show. They have to make brownies, tackle a handful of a technical challenge, and also a 3-D biscuit. Presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding guide them through the assorted tasks, and Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith pass judgment on their baking skills

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Members of the Fullagar family get more than they bargained for when they are introduced to father and daughter, Pepe and Tink - who can't be separated. Meanwhile, Louise and Angela are conflicted when Trinity a five-month-old lurcher puppy shows off both her adorable side and an impressive ability to chew everything from furniture to shoes

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix sets two chefs to the challenge of replicating the Wagon Wheel, a precise combination of mallow, crumbly biscuit and chocolate. Tristan Welch, who cut his teeth with Gary Rhodes, aims to solve the problem with madcap gadgets, while Cyrus Todiwala, one of the most respected Indian chefs in the country, takes a more instinctive approach. They have seven days to perfect their replicas before a cook-off before a panel of Wagon Wheel bosses, who choose the winner. And while they're busy in the kitchen, comedian Jayde Adams goes behind the scenes to reveal how the circular snack is really made

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sam Harrison and Sophie Germany host the final visit of the week at the Dovecote Inn in Nottinghamshire. Morgan marvels at his room, but Kadir is determined to inspect every nook and cranny after receiving frosty feedback from Sam and Sophie when he hosted. An underwhelming day out touring the village of Laxton is saved only by the hosts' personalities, though later two of the B&Bers have a disagreement over dinner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Weather threatens the launch of an expat's bar in the south of France, and a Dorset couple discover that renovating their cave house is trickier than they anticipated

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad, beginning with Cath and her daughter Kate looking for a tranquil holiday home along the Costa Almeria in southern Spain. Cath wants enough space for her family to be able to visit, but she also wants somewhere to escape the rat race and find inspiration for her writing. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Steve Robinson lost an arm in a motocross accident, but he has not let that stop his lust for adventure. He's been learning to fly and loves horse riding, and is seeking the perfect place in either Lincolnshire or the Extremadura region of Spain. Experts Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton offer assistance in his quest

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Nicki Pritchard and Nigel Cooper are unsure whether to purchase a second home on Britain's south coast in Brighton or in the Costa del Sol, Spain. Property experts Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton show them properties in both locations to try to help them decide

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gemma Willock hosts the first party in the West Midlands, and her evening of glitz and glamour looks set to be a roaring success until an unwelcome revelation about her corner-cutting approach to the competition threatens her chances of taking the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mortgage adviser Andrew Devey throws the second party in the West Midlands, hosting a beatnik-themed evening. He cooks shepherd's pie for his main course, as well as lining up some pop art in the hope that it will expand his guests' minds

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Jules Evans hosts the third day of the competition in the West Midlands, and plans to indulge her passion for historical re-enactments by planning a medieval-themed dinner. The guests offer mixed responses when they look at the menu, but things take a turn for the better when she announces a duel will form part of the evening's entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Massage therapist Lucy Hird hosts the fourth dinner party from the West Midlands, featuring an extensive menu full of Thai specialities. She also gives individual presents to her guests, but her night is compromised by the entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mental-health nurse Lloyd Cast hosts the final dinner party from the West Midlands. Despite appearing to be an extrovert so far, he decides on a chilled theme for the evening to allow his food to take centre stage, before the winner of the £1,000 is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Colin and Richard from Glasgow love Playa del Ingles in Gran Canaria and have been holidaying there for over 20 years. With retirement approaching, they feel now's the perfect time to buy their dream holiday home there to escape the Scottish winters and spend up to six months of the year in the sunshine. Jean Johansson lines up five potential properties for their budget of £200,000, but will any of them seem the perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lynne and her sister Debbie seek the perfect place on the beautiful Costa Teguise in Lanzarote. After Lynne's husband Frankie was diagnosed with a terminal illness, Lynne took early retirement to care for him. A holiday home in the sun has been a lifelong dream for this couple, and with Frankie's illness they don't want to wait any longer. With a budget of £150,000, Ben Hillman lines up five suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Actor John Lithgow, comedian Jon Richardson, Paralympian Hannah Cockroft, and funnyman Russell Brand take on three challenges in the baking show. They have to make brownies, tackle a handful of a technical challenge, and also a 3-D biscuit. Presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding guide them through the assorted tasks, and Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith pass judgment on their baking skills

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two couples searching the south east. English-born Tom and his Floridian wife Kaitlyn have only seen a handful of properties, so balancing his desire for a vegetable garden with her American dream of a big open-plan living space proves a difficult balance for Kirstie. Phil helps Pete and Georgie, who moved into a studio flat right before the lockdown in spring 2020 and are desperate for more space. Wanting to start a family, they're after something to grow into, but Pete is conscious of value for money

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again (2018)
programme.desc: A sinister cyber attack reveals the identity of all active undercover agents in Britain. Hapless secret agent Johnny English is sent on a mission to the South of France to protect Queen and country, and find the mastermind hacker responsible. Third movie in the comedy series, starring Rowan Atkinson, Ben Miller and Olga Kurylenko

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: One expat cashes in on football fever at their bar on the Côte d'Azur, while four-legged guests boost a couple's business in France

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Pub landlady Alison seeks a home on the Costa Dorada in Spain. Famous for its golden beaches, the region has stunning river valleys and traditional hilltop villages, where Alison would love to buy a smallholding and keep chickens. With five options up his sleeve, Jonnie Irwin helps Alison and her friend Theresa, who's come along for support, find the perfect property for her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: A man who works abroad for a lot of the year and his partner want to live in the best possible environment to raise their two-year-old son. However, they cannot decide whether this is in Somerset or near Valencia in Spain. Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton step in with some expert advice

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Andy and Gaynor Jones have inherited enough money to buy a holiday home for their family, but are torn between St Ives in Cornwall and Costa del Azahar in Spain

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty school co-ordinator Kay Greenwood hosts the second dinner party in Cambridge, hoping her tempura prawns and beef stroganoff will win her the £1,000 prize. One guest is sceptical about her chances of success, but changes his mind when he samples her unique entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gardening enthusiast Matt Sullivan hosts the third dinner party in Cambridge, where his home-grown English menu of 'posh' fish and chips and rice pudding surprises his guests. Rather than focusing on the cooking, he creates his own school fete and tries to wow everyone with a selection of outdoor games as he vies for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: International development manager Hawa Sydique hosts the fourth dinner party from Cambridge, and her adventurous menu seems to cause more problems than it is worth. However, she hopes to impress with the 20-piece samba band in her living room, but the other guests are a little overwhelmed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beatles-loving Scouser David Goodier hosts the final dinner party in Cambridge and is determined to impress his guests with a 1960s Merseybeat dress code and courses entitled 'Spicy Beatballs' and 'Tir-Mersey-su'. As the evening draws to a close, the winner of the £1,000 cash prize is revealed

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rita and Stephen from Watford have visited the lively Portuguese town of Albufeira over 40 times now and are finally looking to buy their own holiday home there. They want somewhere that's close to both the beach and all the action for their budget of £150,000. Jasmine Harman lines up five potential properties for them to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elvis fan Sandra and her husband Desmond seek help in their search for their dream holiday home near Mar Menor's stunning beaches on Spain's Costa Calida. They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son planning to convert an oil rig escape boat into a floating home, and an inventor working on a perfectly spherical house. The Spanish tour concludes with a visit to a studio apartment by the sea with rotating internal walls, and the team's expandable camper goes on its maiden voyage at the grand opening on Hastings Pier

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect revisits his travels, starting off in Canada, near the Rocky Mountain town of Golden. George finds himself face to face with a 2000lb buffalo and visits a stunning self-built log farmhouse. And on the Coromandel Peninsula in New Zealand, George visits an epic panoramic beach house

programme.title: Trip Hazard: My Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Rosie's is joined by fellow comedian Joe Wilkinson for a traditional seaside adventure in the North Yorkshire coastal town of Whitby, a place that boasts history, gothic architecture and the chippie that won the award for the UK's best fish and chips. The pair explore the area's famed Jurassic Coast where, alongside a fossil-hunting expert, they attempt to find ancient relics on the beach. In homage to the area's association with Dracula, the duo also enjoy a full gothic makeover. Narrated by Olivia Colman

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A wealthy 21-year-old with a busy social life moves in with a single mother from Orpington and her three children. She learns an important lesson in the need to become independent from her parents - and their money

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: In Northumbria, a specialist sewage blockage team tackle a series of weather-induced problems, including a manhole spouting wet wipes, a drain blocked by plastic bottles and a poo 'sausage' threatening to send raw sewage back into people's homes. Meanwhile, in Worcestershire, the food inspectors are out in force, conducting a second round of surprise visits on two restaurants that did not quite make the mark last time. With more than 500 deaths a year from food poisoning and more than 7,000 food establishments failing basic hygiene standards annually, the two eateries have their work cut out to satisfy the inspectors

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Meanwhile, Hamza hopes to get his council flat back after he tried to help a neighbour's friend by letting them stay for a week, but ended up being shut out when they refused to leave. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A police chase ends with the driver of a stolen Lexus crashing the luxury motor, and the police interception unit deals with an Essex girl whose car is 'too sexy' for the law. Elsewhere, a high-speed pursuit results in a head-on collision with one of the team's vehicles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team discovers the garage hideout of a gang of burglars in a country lane, and pursues a BMW driver who endangers his life by running across four lanes of a dual carriageway to escape with a suspicious package. The police interceptors also apprehend a mother driving with no tax, insurance or MOT, who turns out never to have passed her driving test

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers follow a stolen BMW fitted with a tracking device as it heads for a cargo ship, while a drunk driver is pursued through Epping Forest. Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police interception unit in Essex

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriff Paul Bohill tackles the case of a small debt owed by ex-footballer Neil 'Razor' Ruddock to a kennel owner, before being forced to evict a school dinner lady in south London. Meanwhile, in the north of England enforcement agent Stewart MacCracken heads out with trainee Iain Taylor to confront a Yorkshire builder they need to get payment from at his home, while a reptile shop owner hit by online competitors urgently needs to pay a debt for the feed company he relies on to keep his animals alive

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Enforcement officers are faced with the difficult job of evicting a woman with two children - a task that takes a turn for the worse when her ex-partner makes an appearance. programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The secret world of Iceland's food development, sourcing, manufacturing and distribution, through exclusive access to the outlets and suppliers. In Thornton Cleveleys, just north of Blackpool, bargain-hunting customers are queuing overnight to be first in line to get some cheap food and the chance to win vouchers to spend at the opening of a brand new store

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks claiming benefits whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan clean up a semi-detached house in Bedford belonging to a woman with rheumatoid arthritis, which has left her with extremely restricted mobility

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in Blackpool

Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent tries to find his ring at the Willis house, but runs into a problem. Aaron asks Chloe to keep her feelings hidden for now

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Martha discharges herself from the hospital and disappears, prompting a desperate search. Susie tells Justin and Leah to get a larger deposit or find a private lender

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: The real stories of more people living the high life by the sea on a low budget. B&B owner Chris has dropped his prices to keep turnover high. Will an incoming hen party be happy with his cheap-and-cheerful approach? Ian tries to attract punters to his donkey ride business, Sharon's dream of running the town's first Caribbean restaurant proves to be a tall order, and at her static home on a retirement park, Sandra organises a posthumous birthday party for her late husband

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Russell, a 72-year-old man is rushed into hospital by paramedics suffering from severe chest pains, while Dr Dyfrig Hughes treats Michael, who was brought in by ambulance after falling ten feet from a ladder while cutting hedges. Elsewhere, junior doctor George Kay has some exciting news to share with the team

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following the work of medical staff at Stoke's Royal University Hospital, as they strive to save the lives of sick and injured patients. A one-punch attack in the street leaves a man with a potentially devastating head injury, and trauma team leader Richard quickly realises he needs to perform emergency surgery on a bleed inside his brain. A young man arrives with multiple broken bones and suspected internal injuries following a motorbike accident, while a factory worker hopes the team can save his arm after a horrific accident with a circular saw

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A patient brought into Hull Royal Infirmary by police claims to have swallowed drugs, but he refuses to co-operate with staff, putting them under further pressure. In resus, a patient's life hangs in the balance as the team assess the extent of a serious brain bleed, which could be life-altering, while a 17-year-old arrives after injuring his ankle at a skate park

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Critical Care Paramedic Fay is despatched to the scene of a serious motorbike crash, and Ambulance control receive an emergency call reporting a man collapsed in a churchyard

programme.title: Me & My Facial Disfigurement
programme.desc: Documentary following three young people with facial disfigurements as they take on new challenges - getting tattooed, going to university, and performing at an open mic night

programme.title: Plastic Surgery Knifemares
programme.desc: The obsession with surgery that often goes hand in hand with a rise to fame, including model Danielle Lloyd, who nearly died when her boob job went wrong

programme.title: The Disappearance
programme.desc: Susan and Charles make a mysterious discovery in the park, and the investigation into Anthony's disappearance is reopened after two years

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Braintree's waste enforcement officers crack down on dog owners who are leaving the region in a mess. Plus, Malvern waste warriors Dan and Jude hunt down bags of rotten refuse that have been washed into the local waterways

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Watford builder David Simpson has a fight on his hands when his long-term tenant moves her boyfriend in and suddenly decides to stop paying - and when he tries to evict her, she makes life difficult. In Woolwich, lawyer Chris Sharpe helps a client whose property has been taken over by squatters, who have changed the locks and claim they are legitimately renting the house

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The owner of a tanning salon regrets letting an employee move into a house he owns when he is faced with complaints from the neighbours about wild parties and £3,000 in unpaid rent. A couple managing a property for their daughter arrange to sell it, only to find the tenant refuses to leave, while a housing enforcement officer goes in search of a landlord who has left a tenant without light, heat or running water

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue international car thieves as they try to leave the country in a stolen BMW, and police chase a drink-driver through Epping Forest. In Southend, burglary suspects fleeing back to London find themselves surrounded by multiple interceptor units

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The unit's hi-tech helicopter is called on to help pursue a motorcyclist riding at speeds of up to 130mph and showing no sign of slowing down for oncoming traffic or police cars. A petrol thief risks danger when trying to destroy evidence, and an officer tests the latest weapon in the fight against crime - a Subaru Impreza STi

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police dog unit is called into action to chase a thief seen trying to break into a lorry, and the pursuit of a Range Rover leads the interceptors to a haul of stolen prestige cars. A seized Lamborghini brings out the team's competitive streak, and the presence of an intruder puts the station on full alert

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent surprises Aaron and David when he impresses Leila as she comes over for a home assessment. Mackenzie develops feelings for Richie

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Alf declares that he is taking Martha home, to everyone's scepticism. Susie opens a separate account for the surplus money at the surfing competition

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan clean up a semi-detached house in Bedford belonging to a woman with rheumatoid arthritis, which has left her with extremely restricted mobility

programme.title: Extreme Nightmare Tenants
programme.desc: The work of lawyer Chris Sharpe, who specialises in helping landlords who are plagued by troublesome tenants and trespassers. Chris tries to remove trespassers from a landowner's one-and-a-half-acre site, filling it with up to 20 caravans and a mountain of rubbish - only for things to take a menacing turn. Business partners in Bristol dream of turning a derelict swimming baths into flats, but their dreams turns sour when squatters move in, and Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict squatters from an abandoned print factory in Essex

programme.title: Braveheart (1995)
programme.desc: Account of the life of medieval Scottish hero William Wallace. After the slaughter of his father and brother, young Wallace is taken in by his uncle, who teaches him how to use not only his brawn but his brain - which he employs to great effect years later when he resolves to drive the English out of Scotland. Oscar-winning historical epic, directed by and starring Mel Gibson. With Patrick McGoohan, Sophie Marceau and Catherine McCormack

Bull hopes they can convince the jury that Jim has redeemed himself for his past misdeeds by living an upstanding life for years

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After the body of a navy lieutenant is discovered aboard a destroyer during a 'tiger cruise', a time when civilian guests are allowed to spend the night on the ship, Gibbs, Quinn and Palmer travel out to sea to investigate. Meanwhile, McGee contemplates the perfect proposal for Delilah Fielding

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a missing MI6 Officer is linked to a murdered petty officer, Gibbs sends Quinn and Bishop to Philadelphia to work with MI6 Officer Clayton Reeves. Meanwhile, Quinn painfully recounts the NCIS case that made her leave field work

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Sanitation workers find the body of a teenage boy, and the investigation leads to a school bully who displays an enthusiastic interest in martial arts. As the case progresses, the team discovers the youngster's father had bought the murder weapon, and attempts a risky gamble to bring the killer to justice

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hard-partying model, with a cocaine habit goes missing, and when the team investigates, a basketball player, a limo driver and a nightclub owner are suspected of orchestrating her disappearance

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the strangulation of a college graduate who moonlighted as a stripper to pay off her fees, and learn that the girl's death is linked to insider trading involving a former porn star and her mentor. Jerry Orbach stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The relatives of a wealthy woman found in a coma come under suspicion when the team investigates her subsequent death. It later transpires she was suffering from a degenerative disease, and the theory of a possible mercy killing crumbles when the family's affairs, both financial and sexual, come to light. David Dukes guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is kidnapped, but manages to escape her captor. The NCIS team members investigate and soon discover a possible connection to her missing husband. Meanwhile, Abby knits both Quinn and Torres personalised 'gifts'

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres boldly breaks protocol when he learns a witness in an NCIS case is wanted by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Meanwhile, Bishop and McGee hope to sublet Tony's apartment - by wooing his father, landlord Tony DiNozzo Sr. Robert Wagner guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ellie questions her previous work at the NSA after she is sent to Gitmo to gather evidence for a Navy chaplain murder case. Meanwhile, Bishop's brothers visit for the Thanksgiving holiday and pester her co-workers to find out who she is dating

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Syd and McKenna's hunt for Gabriel Knox intensifies as they let the Bens in on their search for the elusive Arlo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A troubled airport baggage supervisor is found murdered, prompting Goren and Eames to interrogate her colleagues about their reasons for distrusting her. The policemen finally uncover evidence of an operation that could well have been enough reason to silence the victim. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when the owner of one of the city's most exclusive hotels is found dead from a fatal injection of Botox, and suspicion falls on her unstable daughter, who resented her mother's interference in her love life. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a man is found dead at the bottom of a flight of steps after fleeing from an argument, but his injuries make it hard to determine exactly how he died. In a seemingly unrelated incident a jogger is strangled and pinned to a tree by an arrow, but an unusual variety of chewing gum links the two crimes. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A crime-scene lab technician is murdered in a manner remarkably similar to how one of her predecessors died in 1957, and someone anonymously texts pictures of the victim to Mac and Jo. The investigators discover the woman had been out drinking with two colleagues on the night of her death and receive some help from the retired detective who investigated the original case. Guest starring Lee Majors (The Six Million Dollar Man) and Spencer Grammer (Greek)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a series of mysterious deaths in which people simply exploded, and discover it may be the consequence of a centuries-long feud. Elsewhere, Monroe and Rosalee talk about moving their relationship a stage further. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When Nick and Hank investigate a drowning death with mysterious marks on the victim's ankles, they happen upon a group of water-bound Wesen. Meanwhile, Rosalee starts unpacking her things at Monroe's, and Captain Renard makes a startling realisation about the possible identities of the royal baby's parents

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A separated couple blame each other for concealing their missing baby, but the discovery of bloodstains in their apartment suggests another, more tragic explanation. An angry Briscoe suspects the father of murder - until the infant's remains are found, raising the possibility that both parents could be responsible

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. Best-selling mystery writer PK Todd and her accountant are gunned down outside a restaurant. Miraculously, Todd survives but her companion is mortally wounded, prompting Briscoe and Green to launch a murder inquiry and discover the culprit's real target. However, they soon find themselves mixed up in a deadly case of jealousy and betrayal. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall and Tom Berenger

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her sleep, and further investigation leads the detectives to a boy whose drug-addicted mother has placed him in the care of her dealer. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team examines the apparently accidental death of a man trying to solve the killing of his son in Chile 30 years earlier. As the investigations gather pace, the officers are embroiled in a belated murder trial

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates a disabled boy's death in an apartment fire, focusing inquiries not only on a tenant who lived in the same building and had been linked to several previous blazes, but also on the victim's parents, who had struggled to cope with the strain of looking after him. With Jerry Orbach, Dianne Wiest and guest star Rudolph Giuliani

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the abduction and murder of a teacher, and later discover it's possible that she knew the culprit. Having arrested one of her students, the courts quickly decide their evidence is inadmissible - but it seems another assailant could be to blame. Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a series of escalating threats against congresswoman Jenna Flemming, while Director Vance oversees temporary protection detail. Mary Stuart Masterson guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a US Navy captain brings to light a link to Ducky's late mother, prompting the medical examiner to question a decision he made 37 years earlier. The team members exchange holiday gifts as Gibbs spends Christmas dinner with Fornell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team searches for new leads after an undercover operation to apprehend a businessman who apparently uses acts of terror to manipulate the stock market is compromised. Bishop and Qasim join forces to find a break in the case

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Fin immerse themselves in learning a new witness interview technique. Meanwhile, Benson works with the victim of a rape

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is found murdered, leading Goren and Eames to suspect an ophthalmologist may be involved, especially when they realise that his research into schizophrenia could be masking mental health problems of his own. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the seemingly random murders of several homeless people, uncovering a fraud involving a crooked insurance agent. But when he is found dead, with no sign of the stolen money, the detectives must call on all their experience to catch the killer. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan, with Lance Reddick (The Wire)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The discovery of an amphetamine-like drug that boosts concentration is found in a murder victim's car, leading the detectives to discover he was a referee in a high-stakes video-gaming tournament. They learn he had confiscated the illicit substance, providing them with a possible motive for the killing, but when they uncover the competition was rigged with a computer code, a host of potential suspects emerges. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Parts of a dismembered body are discovered on four street corners, triggering an investigation that eventually leads Mac and the team to suspect Russian mobsters may be responsible. As the case proceeds, an explosion rips through the neighbourhood, indicating that some local men may be seeking to exact their own brand of rough justice. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill, Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank battle a powerful Wesen who has become a vigilante carrying out deadly punishments for human criminals. Meanwhile, Juliette learns the truth about Nick's mother, and Adalind has an ultrasound with unusual results

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A priest is murdered by a boy he is performing an exorcism on. Nick and Hank investigate the case, which leads them to the Wesen Council. Meanwhile, Renard leaves town to deal with the situation in Europe

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a US Navy captain brings to light a link to Ducky's late mother, prompting the medical examiner to question a decision he made 37 years earlier. The team members exchange holiday gifts as Gibbs spends Christmas dinner with Fornell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team searches for new leads after an undercover operation to apprehend a businessman who apparently uses acts of terror to manipulate the stock market is compromised. Bishop and Qasim join forces to find a break in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The seemingly straightforward murder of a stockbroker plunges Briscoe and Green into the murky world of insider-trading and blackmail, as they learn that the victim led a seedy double life. However, their investigations take on a new dimension when the suspected killer is himself bumped off by a professional hitman. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a white teenager in Harlem seems like an open-and-shut case - until two patrol officers are implicated in the crime. As tensions between residents and investigating officers mount, the Mayor puts pressure on Schiff to make an example of the cops, hoping it will be enough to satisfy ADA McCoy. Drama, starring Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A college student is found dead, prompting the detective duo to search for a rapist on campus. However, a report from the medical examiner puts them on a different path, and they discover events may have gone down an even more sinister track

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a woman found bludgeoned to death with a paving slab at a subway station. A petty thief leads them to a man with a history of mental problems, recently released from prison, who confesses to the crime and a previous murder. However, the victim's ex-husband wants to know why the suspect was walking the streets in the first place

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a violinist with the New York Symphony Orchestra and find the trail leads back to her Svengali-like conductor. However, they have a difficult job getting the case to trial, with a reluctant witness, a suspicious judge and a talented lawyer standing between them and a guilty verdict

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a lift, and McCoy finds his prosecution of the prime suspect hampered by a vindictive judge Ross offended in court

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After Gibbs spots the brother of an NCIS Most Wanted suspect, he immediately assumes his former alias and goes undercover with their infamous anti-government militia. Meanwhile, Bishop and Reeves partner on an off-the-books investigation

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Palmer faces a dilemma during a hit-and-run investigation when he spots a stranger standing on a ledge, and places his own life in peril in an attempt to get the man down to safety

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer in a small town outside Washington, D.C, prompts the team to once again partner with The Sherlocks, a privately funded investigative team that includes their newest member, Anthony DiNozzo Sr. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An old family friend from the army beseeches Gibbs to join him on a road trip to search for a missing military ID bracelet. A Navy lieutenant in NCIS protective custody is poisoned by an infamous drug dealer. Dabney Coleman guests stars, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment, her son, recently paroled after serving 15 years for murder, becomes the prime suspect. Goren and Eames meet the detective who investigated the earlier case and discover the man may have been wrongly convicted - revealing a complex cover-up that implicates the policeman himself. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when a man's release from prison coincides with the murder of his wife and lawyer. His claims to have been the killer's real target are given a credibility boost when Goren learns that a notorious criminal might have received a hit-list that featured his son. Crime drama, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo and Lindsay investigate the murder of a successful Brooklyn-born businessman, and discover he insisted on maintaining connections with the housing project where he was raised. His wife's statement contains inconsistencies, raising suspicions about her private life - but as events unfold, it becomes clear that neighbourhood drug dealers are involved. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Sela Ward and Anna Belknap

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is seriously wounded in a shooting. While the team hunts down the gunman in a bid to bring him to justice, the veteran detective has a vision of his late wife Claire (Jaime Ray Newman) and agonises over whether he wants to fight for life or be reunited with her in death. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick encounter an urban legend in the Portland sewers. Renard faces up to the recent assassination attempt on his life and Prince Viktor arrives in Europe to bring those responsible for the demise of his cousin Eric to justice. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Sasha Roiz

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu search for two missing teenagers, and realise they have been taken by an evil spirit of Christmas that plans to eat them as punishment for being naughty. Elsewhere, Renards' tour of Europe brings him closer to tracking down Adalind

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore two terraced houses and a large semi-detached property in the Midlands and the North East. They meet a couple who want to complete the redevelopment of one of the buildings before the arrival of their second baby

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts observe property renovations in three locations. A father and son implement ambitious plans to double the sleeping space of a two-bedroom home in Kent, while a family returns from Jamaica to make a profit on its flat in Lewisham, south-east London. Plus, a former HR manager in Stoke-on-Trent tries to turn two period terraces into visually striking properties

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Charles Hanson visit Newark-on-Trent, and try to uncover some hidden gems to take to auction in Bolton

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charles Hanson and Margie Cooper are halfway through their road trip, starting in Melbourne, South Derbyshire before heading to auction in the Norfolk town of Aylsham

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Upcycling entrepreneur EJ Osborne heads to Working Recycling Centre seeking to rescue and revamp three pieces of tip-bound trash. An old gas meter box is worked on by robot-maker Mark Haig and a tired table and chairs are given a creative once over by carpenter Bruce Faulseit. EJ has some racing tyres to rev his creative engine, but will all three transformations succeed in making a profit?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Arthur embarks on a quest to prove himself a worthy heir to the throne of Camelot by retrieving the Golden Trident from the Fisher King. However, Morgana spots an opportunity to attack the prince outside the safety of the citadel, and plays a trick that leaves him in mortal peril. Starring Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath, with Donald Sumpter (Being Human)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Jim Brass takes time off from his regular duties to visit his daughter in Hollywood and help investigate the disappearance of her friend, a mystery the police are strangely reluctant to look into. Inquiries lead him to the abandoned car she was last seen in, and he subsequently uncovers a connection between the vehicle and a mayoral candidate. Detective drama, starring Paul Guilfoyle and Gary Dourdan

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Vietnam Prisoners of War Ernie Brace and John McCain and the friendship they formed by tapping code through the cell walls of Hanoi Hilton prison in the late 1960s. The pair did not meet face to face until an event at the White House in 1973. Brace was the longest-held American civilian prisoner, detained for nearly eight years. McCain would go on to become a US senator and contest the Republican nomination for president against George W Bush

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Police call on multiple units and the Eagle helicopter as they hunt for a stolen vehicle, and a cyclist cannot quite comprehend why he should not ride his bike on the motorway

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A party of Kiwi revellers on a stag night ditch their Australian companion, and a car crash leads to some unusual behaviour on the side of the motorway

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australia's biggest airports as customs and immigration officers tackle drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australia's biggest airports as customs and immigration officers tackle drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team visits a planet where another group is planning to observe a black hole, but finds the population has been wiped out by disease, except for one girl, who has been used by the Goa'uld to create a human time bomb. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A woman is found in suspended animation - and the team is shocked to discover that it is Dr Weir, who tells them of her trip 10,000 years into Atlantis's past. Sci-fi drama, starring Torri Higginson

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew is baffled when a member of an away team is killed exploring ruins - then turns up hours later to claim her orphaned son

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The Jem'Hadar take over the Defiant, leaving Dax, O'Brien and Bashir to save the day - but it is Sisko who eventually restores order. Sci-fi drama, starring Avery Brooks, Terry Farrell and Colm Meaney

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The ship encounters a vessel in the Delphic Expanse that could help the crew discover the whereabouts of an enemy superweapon. Science fiction drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Lost Girl
programme.desc: A traditional stag hunt is held to determine who will become the next Ash. Bo is ambivalent until a surprise visitor with a vested interest appears in her living room. Fantasy drama, starring Anna Silk

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo and the team race against the clock when Luca spots a serial killer everyone thought was dead, while Jessica is forced to act when she gets a threatening letter

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo's informant friend is killed while getting intel on a gang of robbers, and Jessica learns the leader of the FBI task force brought in to help has been acting strangely

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Camelot stages a legendary tournament attracting a great many warriors from far and wide, one of whom is small in stature but has a secret weapon - magic. As the young man begins to realise the full potential of his powers and resolves to use them to win the event, Merlin faces a race against time to make him see that his actions not only put his own life in danger, but also threaten to tear the city apart. Guest starring Harry Melling (Dudley Dursley in the Harry Potter films)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part one of two. Arthur and Merlin embark on a dangerous mission to retrieve the cup of life, a powerful artefact that carries the gift of immortality. Before they can seize the magical goblet, they are captured by corrupt slave trader Jarl, who helps the cup to find its way into Morgause's hands. Fortunately for the duo, an old friend comes to the rescue, but with the power of eternal life at the disposal of Morgana and her sister, Uther's reign may be about to end. Guest starring Ralph Ineson (The Office)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine flirts with a man in a bar who later becomes the prime suspect in the case of two women who have been killed in similar circumstances. At first the evidence against him seems conclusive - but the discovery of an incongruous fingerprint leads to speculation that he is being framed. Starring Marg Helgenberger and featuring Alan Rosenberg, her then real-life husband, in a guest role

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Former American contractor Roy Hallums was working in Baghdad providing food to the US Military in 2004 when a masked gang kidnapped him and five others. They spent 311 days held by the Iraqi resistance group before being rescued by members of the US Army's Delta Force

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy allows the kids to throw a party while he takes his disapproving mother-in-law out to dinner to keep her away from the house. However, it soon becomes clear Diana has also been sneaking around behind everyone's backs. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The team offers advice to a 19-year-old fitness instructor who claims to have never eaten a vegetable, and a woman whose menopausal hot flushes are ruining her life. Also examined is a 39-year-old photographer whose diet may be causing her spine to fuse. The results of the first Big Food Trial are announced, and Pixie McKenna investigates the reliability of do-it-yourself food-intolerance tests

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine (1970)
programme.desc: A tyrannically strict Lancashire father brings about the downfall of his family by forcing his daughter to eat a meal against her will. Drama, starring James Mason, Diana Coupland, Susan George and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: The Moodys
programme.desc: Comedy following the dysfunctional Moody family in Australia, with each episode focusing on a unique occasion over the course of a year. Starring Ian Meadows, Jane Harber and Danny Adcock

programme.title: The Moodys
programme.desc: Kevin and Maree's wedding anniversary prompts the family to gather for a celebration at the local veterans' centre. As the clan spends time together to remember how important family is, an unforeseen occurrence at the party triggers a series of catastrophes

programme.title: The Occupation
programme.desc: The incredible true story of Sara Góralnik who at age 13 survived the Holocaust by taking refuge in a small Ukrainian village and passing as a Christian after her entire family was killed by Nazis

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: Queen of the Blues (1979)
programme.desc: Two brothers buy a failing Soho nightclub and hope to turn its fortunes around - but they end up being threatened by gangsters demanding protection money.
